expectations.evidence: "use one execution per pathologist" and "Do NOT create one execution per label (2000 x 3 = 6000 executions would clutter provenance)"
Shows add_feature_value with entries=[{"target_rid": "2-IMG0001", "value": "Normal"}, ...] containing all 2000 entries in one call
Uses workflow_name="Pathologist A Diagnosis Review", "Pathologist B Diagnosis Review", "Pathologist C Diagnosis Review"
Each pathologist section ends with stop_execution() after the add_feature_value call
"Each label links to its execution, so you can always trace which pathologist assigned which label" and "you would lose the ability to distinguish who labeled what"
